Write content to file. Returns 'OK' on success.
Delete file. Returns 'OK' on success. Throws ERR if not found.
Search and replace string. Returns 'OK' on success. If no exact match is found, it may suggest a similar line using fuzzy matching. Throws ERR if ambiguous or not found.
Execute a bash command in the project root
Move/Rename path. Returns 'OK' on success. Throws ERR if origin not found.
Copy file from origin to destination. Returns 'OK' on success.
Validates if a string is a valid JSON
Changes the agent's display nickname in the chat log
Launches a new independent instance of Paser Mini in the project root.
Stores a piece of information in the long-term memory graph. Use scope='tattoo' for core truths, 'fractal' for general knowledge.
Retrieves information from the long-term memory graph. No args = The Mirror effect. Use direction='next'/'prev' for narrative navigation.
Returns the current token count of the conversation history and its percentage relative to the limit.
Get the project file tree (very fast)
Show differences of a file using git diff
Restore a file to its previous state using git restore
Concatenates the content of the source file to the end of the destination file.
Returns the keys and structure of a JSON node at a given path.
Retrieves the content of a specific JSON node using a path.
Returns the length and item type of a JSON array at a given path.
Updates a specific JSON node with a new value using a path.
List issues in a GitHub repository
Create a new issue in a GitHub repository
Edit an existing issue in a GitHub repository
Close an issue in a GitHub repository
Post a comment to a specific GitHub issue.
Get the current GitHub repository name
Show all changes in the current repository using git diff
